iotevents.detectormodel.lambda.CfnAbout: Calls a Lambda function, passing in information about the detector model instance and the event that triggered the action.

iotevents.detectormodel.lambda.FunctionA.Description: The ARN of the Lambda function that is executed.

iotevents.detectormodel.lambda.Payload.Description: You can configure the action payload when you send a message to a Lambda function.
